domain: Japanese shimenawa (注連縄) shinto sacred rope: rice/straw/hemp twisted rope demarcating sacred/impure space; left-twist counter-clockwise traditional; gradient-taper thicker at ends; K shide (紙垂) zig-zag white-paper streamers clustered at K boundary points; symbolize lightning bolts + attract kami + ward impurities; Amaterasu cave myth origin (Futo-tama drew demarcation rope); set up at torii + shrines + sacred-trees + ground-breaking ceremonies
specific_mechanism: SHIMENAWA-K-SHIDE-CLUSTER-BOUNDARY-GATE-PURIFICATION: token-level context-gating with (1) K-shide-cluster boundary positions S_K: K explicit boundary-marker tokens inserted at regular position-intervals (every L_int tokens); each acts as gate-marker with shide-streamer-style activation pulse; (2) left-twist input-direction asymmetry: attention favors leftward (earlier-in-context) flow over rightward at boundary tokens; analogous to traditional counter-clockwise rope twist; (3) ward-evil token-purification gate G_purify: at each shide-cluster boundary, tokens evaluated for impurity score (toxicity/adversarial-signature); high-impurity tokens routed through purification subspace V_purify before continuing; (4) Futo-tama demarcation prefix: fixed-prefix demarcation boundary token at context start (Amaterasu cave-mouth marker analog) prevents 'return-to-cave' = preservation against unwanted context bleed-back; (5) gradient-taper attention magnitude α(p): attention at position p tapers smoothly between boundary markers (thicker at boundaries, thinner in middle) — analogous to rope's tapered thickness. Differs from R511 SETO-LEELO-LEAD-IMPROV-CHORUS-FIXED-GATE (lead-improvise high-T + K-chorus fixed-K-pattern bank + final-syllable gate-signal g content-selected chorus activation + improvisation-match cross-verifier reward + torro low-frequency anchor third-channel, no K-shide-cluster + no left-twist + no purification subspace + no Futo-tama prefix + no gradient-taper) and R524 OJIBWE-SWEAT-LODGE-4-ROUND-COMPLETION-GATE (4-stage cedar-water completion-metric + 90-degree rotation + conductor master-gate + drum anchor, no K-shide + no left-twist + no Futo-tama) by K-shide-cluster boundary tokens + left-twist asymmetry + ward-evil purification subspace V_purify + Futo-tama demarcation prefix + gradient-taper attention magnitude.
llm_application: SHIMENAWA-K-SHIDE-CLUSTER-BOUNDARY-GATE-PURIFICATION token-level context-gating with K-shide-cluster boundary marker tokens every L_int interval + left-twist input-direction asymmetry leftward-earlier-favor + ward-evil token-purification gate G_purify impurity-score subspace V_purify routing + Futo-tama demarcation prefix-token context-bleed-back prevention + gradient-taper attention magnitude α(p) thicker-at-boundaries. Differs from R397. R412. R435. R444. R461. R474. R486. R499. R511 SETO-LEELO (closest — lead+chorus + final-syllable gate + improvisation + torro). R524 OJIBWE (closest — 4-stage cedar-water + rotation + drum anchor). Differs from Gated Attention 2505.06708 + SinkTrack + Noise Gating 2603.07135 + Qwen3-Next by K-shide-cluster + left-twist + purification + Futo-tama prefix + gradient-taper. Differs by K-SHIDE-CLUSTER BOUNDARY TOKENS + LEFT-TWIST INPUT ASYMMETRY + WARD-EVIL PURIFICATION SUBSPACE + FUTO-TAMA DEMARCATION PREFIX + GRADIENT-TAPER ATTENTION.
novelty_claim: Gated Attention 2505.06708 + SinkTrack + Noise Gating 2603.07135 + Qwen3-Next + Gated Attention NeurIPS 2025 cover gated-attention + boundary-marker space. SHIMENAWA-K-SHIDE-CLUSTER-BOUNDARY-GATE-PURIFICATION adds (a) K-shide-cluster boundary tokens regularly inserted + (b) left-twist input-direction asymmetry at boundaries + (c) ward-evil purification subspace + (d) Futo-tama demarcation prefix-token + (e) gradient-taper attention thicker-at-boundaries. Recombination — borderline lookup.
